_meta.note: All Silent Payments variants measured under identical conditions. BTC and BCH use raw per-tx API (spend_pubkey recomputed each call). LTC-SP uses LtcSpScanner::scan_tx() with precomputed spend_pubkey — closer to production wallet usage.
_meta.api_note: BTC: silent_payment_scan(). BCH: RpaScanner::scan_tx(). LTC-SP: LtcSpScanner::scan_tx() (spend_pubkey precomputed in constructor).

bch_rpa_scan.api: RpaScanner::scan_tx() with spend_epk precomputed in constructor
bch_rpa_scan.note: spend_epk (lift_x) precomputed in constructor since 2026-05-19 fix

ltc_sp_scan.api: LtcSpScanner::scan_tx() with spend_pubkey precomputed in constructor

comparison_note: LTC-SP 2.1x faster than BTC BIP-352 per-call due to spend_pubkey precomputation in LtcSpScanner. With equivalent optimization (SilentPaymentScanner class), BTC throughput would be comparable.
